title: monoripple.config.json
description: Configuration for monoripple — a smart dev runner for Node.js monorepos.

app.description: App directory relative to workspace root, or absolute. Omit when the config lives inside the app package.

command.description: Dev command. String form uses the shell (pipes, expansion). Array form uses direct spawn.

debounce.description: Quiet window before a restart burst fires (ms). Default 200.

before.description: Hook run before every restart (from repo root). String → shell; array → spawn.

beforeDepsOnly.description: Only run `before` when the change is outside the app root.

interactive.description: Enable interactive keypress UI. Default: auto (TTY && !CI).

strictHooks.description: Refuse to run unacked hooks. Default false (warn + continue).

killTimeoutMs.description: Graceful shutdown timeout before SIGKILL. Default 10000.

cooldownMs.description: Post-build quiet window per package (ms). Default 500.

buildConcurrency.description: Max parallel customBuilds at the same topo level. Default 4.

useGitignore.description: Apply .gitignore rules to the watcher. Default true.

noCache.description: Disable the input-hash build cache. Default false.

packages.description: Per-workspace-package overrides keyed by npm name.

customBuild.description: Hook run when this package's files change. String → shell; array → spawn.
